final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for cross-border e-commerce promotion.

Style/medium: needs a promotional poster aesthetic with artistic typography — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 aspect ratio, with layered typography arrangement and a product/subject partially overlapping text
Subject: must include a product or main subject that partially blocks some text elements
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a promotional/energetic atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction that supports complex but not cluttered visual — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include artistic typography with stacked/layered text treatment
Constraints: must preserve complex visual density without appearing cluttered, must include text overlapping effect
Avoid: must avoid visual chaos despite complexity
